headline: Umicore - Transparency notifications by JP Morgan Chase & Co.
summary: Transparency notifications byJP Morgan Chase & Co. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by JP Morgan Chase & Co. that it has crossed the threshold of 3% for direct voting rights downwards on 25 June 2026, and that it has crossed the threshold of 3% for direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments upwards on 26 June 2026. headline: Morgan Stanley Vs. JPMorgan: Which Big Bank Is the Better Buy This Year
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) and JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) both posted Q1 2026 results that showcased strength, yet the businesses behind those numbers look nothing alike. Morgan Stanley leaned on advisory fees and wealth flows. JPMorgan flexed a universal-bank engine touching cards, payments, and trading. headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Stock Gets Fair Value Bump As Analysts Rework Revenue Outlook
summary: The latest analyst work on JPMorgan Chase centers on price target changes that reflect only modest shifts in valuation inputs, with the updated fair value estimate edging from about $337.75 to roughly $344.71. Those moves sit alongside a mix of optimistic and cautious commentary, as some analysts point to revenue and markets activity while others flag the risk that investment banking pipelines may not fully match earlier expectations. As you read on, you will see how to track this evolving...
